chunks.title: Praise of the Bride's Beauty
chunks.reason: The man describes the woman's physical features using poetic similes and declares her flawless.

chunks.title: Invitation to the Mountain and Garden Metaphor
chunks.reason: The man invites the woman from Lebanon and compares her to a sealed garden full of spices.

chunks.title: Call for Fragrance and Union
chunks.reason: The woman calls the winds to bring her beloved into the garden to enjoy its fruits.
